_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for form-fill / OAuth / outreach. Picker chooses profile by email context.
_meta.instructions: Edit profile fields freely. To add a new profile, copy any existing one and tweak `use_for` keywords.

sender_overrides._doc: Deterministic overrides — bypass LLM when sender domain matches. Picker still runs for unknown senders.

_picker_principle: Academic identity is the default — HSE affiliation gives credibility even at industry events. Switch to other profiles ONLY when the context clearly doesn't fit academia (hackathon competition, audit contest, banking conference, where HSE adds nothing or actively misfits).
